name: Signzy
description: AI-powered KYC, KYB and onboarding API platform used by major Indian banks (ICICI, SBI) and 99M+ customers verified.

seo.title: Signzy — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Signzy: AI-powered KYC, KYB and onboarding API platform used by major Indian banks (ICICI, SBI) and 99M+ customers verified.

when_to_use: Aadhaar and PAN KYC API for major Indian bank onboarding
Video KYC for RBI-regulated remote account opening
AI-powered document verification for NBFC loan origination
Business registry KYB check for Indian corporate onboarding
eSign API for Indian financial document execution

pros: Used by ICICI, SBI and other major Indian banks
Full KYC, KYB and onboarding in one API
Strong fit for Indian regulatory requirements
cons: Pricing not transparent, sales negotiations needed
Documentation can feel heavy for small teams
review.verdict: India's flagship KYC/KYB API with real bank deployments; default pick for regulated Indian fintechs.
review.best_for: Indian banks, NBFCs and fintechs needing proven KYC/KYB at hundreds of millions of verifications
review.not_for: Global or non-India teams where local vendors like Persona or Onfido fit their markets better
